dimensions.name: coverage
dimensions.evidence: `definition.yaml` defines 4 deliverables and `plan.json` assigns each exactly once: wave 1 `observations-schema`, wave 2 `alm-observe-cli`, wave 3 `archive-and-triage-integration` and `migration-and-review-prompt`.

dimensions.name: feasibility
dimensions.evidence: All `depends_on` edges are respected (`observations-schema` -> `alm-observe-cli` -> wave 3 deliverables), and wave 3 ownership does not overlap across assignments (`commands/archive.md|commands/triage.md|bin/alm` vs `.furrow/almanac/*|adapters/shared/schemas/todos.schema.yaml|skills/*`).

dimensions.name: specificity
dimensions.evidence: Every assignment in `plan.json` includes a concrete `specialist` and at least one `file_ownership` glob/path.

dimensions.name: research-grounding
dimensions.evidence: The architecture decisions are substantively aligned with the research files, but the plan text does not cite decisions with explicit research artifact references in the required `file path + section` form (for example `.furrow/rows/post-ship-reexamination/research/synthesis.md#D1`).
